artifact_summary: Schematic of the City of Tampa Wastewater Department network for the Howard F. Curren AWTP project, showing PLC, media converter, and SCADA terminal connections.
artifact_blurb: A detailed network topology schematic for the Howard F. Curren Advanced Water Treatment Plant (AWTP) project, operated by the City of Tampa Wastewater Department. The diagram visualizes the industrial control network architecture, specifically mapping the interconnections between Programmable Logic Controllers (PLCs), media converters, and SCADA terminals located at various pump stations and control buildings.
